name: Aromatic Green Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Snap beans, cut into bite-size pieces
3 oz Brussels sprouts, cut into bite-size pieces
3 oz Broccoli, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam beans, Brussels sprouts, and broccoli for 8 minutes.
2. Combine the cooked beans and walnuts with the remaining ingredients: soy oil, fresh dill, sage, salt, lemon juice, and cayenne.
3. Mix in 2 ounces of water until everything is well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a blender and puree until smooth.
5. Pour the sauce over the vegetables.
6. Serve hot or cold.
